dotnet-reqnroll-report 1.0.0+5861c1848607ff6da7360022a62d14bcd1fbc6b1
Copyright (C) 2026 dotnet-reqnroll-report
USAGE:
Generate step definition usage report for project and save HTML in current
folder:
  reqnroll-report --project "Test project folder"
Generate step definition usage report for project and save HTML in output
folder:
  reqnroll-report --output "Report Output folder" --project "Test project
  folder"

  -p, --project    Required. Path to the Reqnroll project folder

  -o, --output     Path to directory, where test report file will be saved

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.
